Metadata.title: John Serra - Data-Driven Problem Solver
Metadata.description: Leveraging decades of experience across manufacturing, education, and urban mobility to solve complex challenges with modern, data-driven approaches.

Hero.headline: Decades of Experience. A Modern, Data-Driven Approach.
Hero.introduction: Leveraging a career that spans manufacturing, education, and urban mobility, I specialize in solving complex challenges. My focus is on using data to find clarity and drive measurable growth, regardless of the industry.

AboutTeaser.heading: About Me
AboutTeaser.content: With a unique blend of hands-on manufacturing expertise, educational leadership, and data analytics skills, I bring a comprehensive perspective to every project. My approach combines decades of real-world experience with modern technological solutions to deliver tangible results.

patentedProcess.title: Patented Process Innovation
patentedProcess.description: Led the re-engineering of a patented process for self-absorbent polystyrene foam trays, enhancing product functionality for a national polystyrene foam packaging company.

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation in Crisis
digitalTransformation.description: As Education Coordinator during the abrupt COVID-19 shutdown, I led the complete transition of a language school from paper-based methods to a live, online learning environment, ensuring educational continuity by digitizing all curriculum and training the entire teaching staff on new technologies.

strategicGrowth.title: Strategic Growth Automation
strategicGrowth.description: Architecting an automated business development engine to streamline market research and lead evaluation. This system is designed to generate highly targeted prospect lists, shifting team focus from manual data collection to strategic networking and client communication.

bdAutomation.title: BD Automation Suite
bdAutomation.description: A modular Python pipeline that automates multi-stream business development, from prospect research to AI-drafted outreach.

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation in Crisis
digitalTransformation.description: Leading a language school's complete pivot to online learning during COVID-19.

careerTalkLab.title: CareerTalkLab
careerTalkLab.description: A hybrid LMS for Turkish professionals learning English — AI-assisted feedback, flipped classroom model, built with Next.js and Supabase.

About.title: About — John Serra
About.description: Account Manager, business development strategist, and data-driven problem solver with decades of experience across manufacturing, education, and urban mobility.
